title: Days Of Destiny
description: The new worlds look like someone has been there before... But who?
body:
# **Days Of Destiny**
The new worlds look like someone has been there before... But who?

![I see you...](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5f0db8763cbc15e086dd8f3022a3dcb71203fcb2_0.webp)
## **Official version of the mod is only on Modrinth.**
### **Before playing:**
- Mod can open applications.
- Mod can change your Minecraft settings.
- Mod can create .txt files.
- Mod works correctly only on Windows.
- Mod does not work properly on servers with more than one player.
- This is not a virus. Everything is done safely and does not affect the operation of the system or other applications!
### **Credits:**
- Inspiration: The Broken Script.
- Textures: Nostalgia+ by Uneriu in older versions. Programmer Art+ by Crackers0106 and Programmer Art by Mojang.
